slides.headline: Group Similar Work
slides.body: Organize certifications by program or student group.
bullets: Tip: Use a spreadsheet or database.

slides.headline: Use Templates
bullets: Example: Use a standard COE form template.
Tip: Customize templates for each program.

slides.headline: Set Deadlines
slides.body: Establish clear deadlines for each batch.
bullets: Example: Set a deadline for each certification group.

slides.headline: Review Together
bullets: Tip: Use a group chat for quick feedback.

slides.headline: Document Work
slides.body: Document each batch for future reference.
bullets: Example: Keep a log of each certification batch.
Tip: Use a digital file system.

slides.body: Start batching your end-of-term certifications today. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Streamline your end-of-term certification process by batching similar work. Group by program, use templates, set deadlines, review together, and document. Start batching today!

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5 of 5, which could benefit from a more concise takeaway or a visual element to draw more attention.
